ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey's purpose */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the survey (e.g., social behavior) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for follow-up */,
  "consent" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent has given consent */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date when the respondent withdrew consent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being responded to */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent providing the response */,
  "alienation" INTEGER /* Score indicating feelings of alienation */,
  "isolation" INTEGER /* Score indicating feelings of isolation */,
  "powerl" INTEGER /* Score indicating feelings of power dynamics */,
  "norml" INTEGER /* Score indicating normative beliefs */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level attained */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the respondent */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose for which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys_categories" (
  "survey_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the survey-category mapping */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_categories_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "longitudinal_studies" (
  "longitudinal_study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each longitudinal study */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey associated with the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("longitudinal_study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_longitudinal_studies_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_anonymization" (
  "anonymization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anonymization process */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey associated with the anonymization */,
  "anonymization_date" TEXT /* Date the anonymization was performed */,
  "anonymization_method" TEXT /* Method used for anonymization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anonymization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_anonymization_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "compliance_check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey associated with the check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance check was performed */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
